<!--
Sitrep — the up-channel of the coordination protocol (ADR 0038).
Fill the four lines below; they are how the contract surface reconciles
or escalates this change. Delete this comment.
-->

## Sitrep — ADR NNNN

- **Implements:** ADR NNNN (<backlog item / step>)
- **Diverged from ADR:** none | <what + why>
- **Needs ADR review:** none | needs-ADR-review: <the contract-shape decision forced>
- **Contract surfaces touched:** <contracts/*.yml, conventions/*, ARCHITECTURE.md, or none>

<!--
Reminders:
- Needs ADR review is the escalation trigger — if execution forced a change to a
  contract's shape, a producer/consumer pattern, or contradicted the ADR's
  Decision, STOP and flag it here rather than deciding locally (ADR 0038 §3).
- Contract surfaces touched is the reconcile work-list for the nccs-contracts
  commander session.
- Leave ADR breadcrumbs in commits: `ADR NNNN step N — <what>`.
-->
